# A genre trust model for defending shilling attacks in recommender systems

**Authors:** Li Yang, Xinxin Niu  
**Year:** 2021  
**URL:** https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s40747-021-00357-2  
**Evidence type:** Recommender-system security research

## Claim supported

Profile-injection/shilling attacks manipulate recommender systems by pushing or nuking target items.

## Key result

Describes shilling attack profiles and push/nuke attack logic against collaborative filtering systems.

## How it supports manufactured traction

This source strengthens the argument that digital systems can be moved by manipulated proxy signals. Use it as evidence for the mechanism, not as proof that every campaign succeeds.
